title: Lakshmi Narasimha Temple, Bhadravathi
tagline: Lakshmi Narasimha Temple, Bhadravathi — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: Lakshmi Narasimha Temple, also referred to as Lakshminarasimha temple of Bhadravati, is a 13th-century Hindu temple dedicated to Vishnu, built by the Hoysala ruler Vira Someshwara.
overview.description: Lakshmi Narasimha Temple, also referred to as Lakshminarasimha temple of Bhadravati, is a 13th-century Hindu temple dedicated to Vishnu, built by the Hoysala ruler Vira Someshwara. It is located in Bhadravati, Shimoga District of Karnataka state, India. The temple opens to the east and has three sanctums, one each dedicated to Venogopala, Lakshminarasimha and Vishnu-Puroshottama. It is notable for its Vesara architecture, with artwork that includes legends and deities of Vaishnavism, as well as those of Shaivism, Shaktism and Vedic deities.

topPlaces.name: Bhadravati, Karnataka
topPlaces.description: Bhadravati or Bhadrāvathi is an industrial city or Steel Town and taluk in the Shivamogga District of the Indian state of Karnataka. It is situated at a distance of about 255 kilometres (158 mi) from the state capital Bengaluru and at about 20 kilometres (12 mi) from the district headquarters, Shivamogga.

topPlaces.name: Donabaghatta
topPlaces.description: Donabaghatta is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Bhadravati taluk of Shimoga district in Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Honnavile
topPlaces.description: Honnavile is a village in Shimoga district in the central part of the state of Karnataka. This place is located 2 km from state highway BH road.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Lakshmi Narasimha Temple, Bhadravathi?
faq.a: The best time to visit Lakshmi Narasimha Temple, Bhadravathi is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Lakshmi Narasimha Temple, Bhadravathi?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mangaluru International Airport (132 km) and the nearest railway station is Mangaluru Central (143 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Lakshmi Narasimha Temple, Bhadravathi?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Lakshmi Narasimha Temple, Bhadravathi at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Lakshmi Narasimha Temple, Bhadravathi?
faq.a: Stays in Lakshmi Narasimha Temple, Bhadravathi start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Lakshmi Narasimha Temple, Bhadravathi?
faq.a: The top attractions are Bhadravati, Karnataka, Donabaghatta, Honnavile.
